acceptanceCriteria: All GH-11 acceptance criteria remain satisfied: /rigor:assess reports evidence-anchored task characteristics with explicit confidence and never names or selects a model; deterministic validation runs via rigor route --dry-run before any --record; stop paths for low confidence, contradictory evidence, missing acceptance criteria, and required human decision are documented; /rigor:orchestrate accepts both human-authored and assess-produced routing input; SPIKE-ROUTE-1 fixtures cover the economy-selected and requires-review flows; configured identity stays unverified.

The two GH-11 independent-review remediations are applied: skills/orchestrate/SKILL.md describes exit-3 results as correctable only for an actual factual error (matching skills/assess/SKILL.md and docs/orchestration.md), and the stopped-flow e2e test asserts a requires-review rigor route --record persisted no routing-plan artifact.
npm run test:all, npm run bench, node scripts/validate-plugin.mjs, claude plugin validate . --strict, and git diff --check all pass on the final tree.
note: Policy permits transmission; minimize content and re-check destination controls.
